title: Cross-Lingual versus Same-Language Retrieval-Augmented Generation for K-12 Educational Question Answering: A Pre-Registered Benchmark of School-Deployable Local LLMs across Greek and Georgian
author: Pappas, Christos
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Pre-registered research protocol for a benchmark study evaluating cross-lingual versus same-language RAG for K-12 STEM question answering in Greek and Georgian. Eight school-deployable GGUF models (3.8B to 14B) including two Greek-fine-tuned variants are evaluated under three retrieval conditions over 21,600 generation events. This protocol predates all benchmark runs and is deposited for reviewer verification per Goodman, Fanelli, and Ioannidis (2016).
steps_raw: Pre-registered research protocol for a benchmark study evaluating cross-lingual versus same-language RAG for K-12 STEM question answering in Greek and Georgian. Eight school-deployable GGUF models (3.8B to 14B) including two Greek-fine-tuned variants are evaluated under three retrieval conditions over 21,600 generation events. This protocol predates all benchmark runs and is deposited for reviewer verification per Goodman, Fanelli, and Ioannidis (2016).
keywords: RAG, retrieval-augmented generation, K-12, Greek, Georgian, low-resource languages, LLM, pre-registration
